item.title: 🦀 Th0rgal/open_oura (342 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Th0rgal

📝 Repository: Th0rgal/open_oura

📄 Descrizione: A Rust toolkit for the Oura Ring (Gen 3/4/5): reverse-engineered BLE protocol, event decoders, and reimplemented data-processing algorithms. Sync, store, and analyze your data locally.
